title: xanthisma glaberrimum
intro: Xanthisma glaberrimum, also known as Smooth Yellow Bells, is a perennial plant native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico, characterized by its bright yellow, bell-shaped flowers. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Xanthisma glaberrimum include reducing inflammation, soothing digestive issues, and treating skin conditions such as wounds and eczema. Herbal preparations of Xanthisma glaberrimum can be made by infusing the leaves in hot water to create a tea, or by using the plant's roots and leaves to create a tincture or salve.
